name: saeed-marketplace
description: SAEED (سعيد) — a self-improving directorate of 54 specialist AI engineers for Claude Code, bilingual Arabic/English, with web + native iOS/Android/macOS, networking + GPU/AI-systems, an HR lead that staffs the team, a prompt engineer, and baked-in skill-sets (an elite Design Excellence canon, a parallel-orchestration/delivery protocol, a capability-first handover doctrine that automates or hands off to Cowork instead of dumping manual chores on you, and a self-governance succession protocol that keeps the team running — and a converged project alive — without a human lead). A product of NABAD Computer Solutions L.L.C.

plugins.name: saeed
plugins.description: Self-Advancing Elite Engineering Directorate: 54 specialist subagents + a governance layer (incl. an HR/staffing lead and a prompt engineer), an absorbed Design Excellence canon with a design-review gate, an absorbed parallel-orchestration/delivery protocol, a capability-first handover doctrine (automate or hand off to Cowork rather than dumping manual chores on the user), a self-governance succession protocol (decision rights, autonomy levels, post-convergence stewardship — runs without a human lead), an ECC-absorbed evidence canon (Verification Protocol with executable gates + /saeed:verify, context discipline with confidence-scored instincts, agentic security) with guardrail hooks that block git-gate bypasses and lint-config weakening, a continuous-improvement loop, and self-upgrade of models and roster.
